3200.name: Alchemist Talisman
3200.desc:
Effect: Soullinks to Alchemists and Creators, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration.
- Increase Acid Demonstration damage by 5%
- Increases effectiveness of Potion Pitcher by Soul Linker's BaseLV% (if the Soul Linker is BaseLV 68, Potion Pitcher heals +68%.
- Allows usage of Berserk Pitcher skill.
- Alchemists having Pharmacy LV 10 are allowed to use Twilight Alchemy I.
- If there is a Super Novice in the party the Alchemist is further allowed to use Twilight Alchemy II.
- Increases effectiveness of Aid Potion by (INT/13)%.
- All offensive skills and attacks have a (INT/25)% chance of inflicting Burning Status on the target.
- Acid Terror becomes a splash skill in an area of 4x4 around the targetted player or mob.
- Increase Cart Cannon damage by 2% per 10 Base Level.
Weight :^777777 1^000000

3201.name: Monk Talisman
3201.desc:
Effect: Soullinks to Monks and Champions, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration.
- The Combo Finish attack becomes a 5x5 cell splash attack.
- SP Cost of combo skills is decreased.
- Allow SP regeneration in Critical Explosion state.
Weight :^777777 1^000000

3202.name: Jedi Talisman
3202.desc:
^FF0000Lost Scroll (press Shift when casting.)^000000
Effect: Soullinks to Jedis, giving twice more time for Force Sacrifice's duration and preventing you from dying.
- You will lose 50% of your HP when the skill ends and won't be able to use the skill again for 1 minute. Also, the same downside from Berserk will be applied: you won't be able to change your equips for the duration of the soullink.
- Increase ATK damage% by 2% per 10 Base Level.
- Increase CRIT damage% by 2% per 10 Job Level.
Weight :^777777 1^000000

3203.name: Sage Talisman
3203.desc:
Effect: Soullinks to Sages and Professors, allowing their Auto Spell Skill to always produce LV 10 Bolts if the Sage has learned that much in the Bolt Skill.
- MATK + 1%
- The Sage's HP will also increase by BaseLvl * 100 HP and his/her Vit will increase by 35.
Weight :^777777 1^000000

3204.name: Crusader Talisman
3204.desc:
Effect: Soullinks to Crusaders and Paladins, making their Shield Boomerang never miss, do double the damage, and halving its after cast delay.
- Increase Smite damage by 60% per skill Level.
- Increase Shield Chain damage by 200%.
- Increase HP by 2%.
- Crusader Spirit cannot be dispell.
Weight :^777777 1^000000

3205.name: Super Novice Talisman
3205.desc:
Effect: Soullinks to Super Novices, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration.
- Super Novices above LV 90 will be temporarily able to equip ALL Upper/Middle/Lower headgears.
- Super Novices above LV 90 have 1% chance to 'erase' the death record - which means, the last 1% EXP loss will be recovered.
- Super Novices above LV 96 will be temporarily able to equip LV 4 Daggers, 1H Swords, Axes, Maces, and Staffs.
- You can use the skill 'Act Dead' during the buff.
Weight :^777777 1^000000

3206.name: Knight Talisman
3206.desc:
Effect: Soullinks to Knights and Lord Knights, allowing those who have Two-Hand Quicken LV 10 to use One-Hand Quicken for the skill's duration.
- Enable to use Level 10 Parrying with One-Hand Weapon with a block chance of 2*SkillLV%.
- All skills have their after delay reduced by 40%.
- Increase Spear Boomerang damage by 200%.
- Increase Spiral Pierce damage by 50%.
- Increase Rapid Spear Boomerang damage by 50%.
Weight :^777777 1^000000

3207.name: Wizard Talisman
3207.desc:
Effect: When the Wizard has a Crystal Fragment while under this skill's effect, the item will be used, and any spells that were reflected back to you via Kaite will simply disappear instead of hitting you.
- MATK + 1%
- The Wizard's HP will also increase by BaseLvl * 200 HP and his/her Vit will increase by Int/5 (For example, 255 Int will give you an additional bonus of 255/5 = 51 Vit. 
- Increase Magic Crasher Damage by 200%.
Weight :^777777 1^000000

3208.name: Priest Talisman
3208.desc:

- Increase Heal skill's effectiveness by 300%
- Increase Judex damage by 3% per 10 Base Level.
- Increase Adoramus damage by 5% per 10 Job Level.
Weight :^777777 1^000000

- Ugly Dance burns 20% SP to enemies when Dancer is linked.
- PDFM ignores Speed Potion and Dark Box of Thunder when Dancer is linked.
- While singing/dancing the walking speed is increased.
- A Whistle and Humming linked.
- Assassin Cross of Sunset and Please Don't Forget Me linked.
- A Poem of Bragi and Fortune's Kiss linked.
- The Apple of Idun and Service for You linked.
- Linked means, if X skill is mastered, then Y skill can be used too while in Spirit mode.
Weight :^777777 1^000000

Weight :^777777 1^000000

7530.name: Travel Brochure [Amatsu]
7530.desc:
[Amatsu the Land of Destiny]
The people of Amatsu carry themselves with honor and tranquility.
During your visit you should see the Beautiful ^ff0000Water Shrine^000000.	The ^ff0000Lord of Amatsu^000000 is much more open
than rulers in other lands, they will talk to visitors and citizens alike.
The ^ff0000Legendary Tree^000000 in Amatsu has many legends about it, such as the Legend that when you propose under
its branches your marriage will be blessed.
While in Amatsu you should see the ^ff0000Coy Pond^000000, nobility of Amatsu keep wonderful gardens or plants, sand and rocks.
Their careful balance and flow reflect the keeper's state of mind.
Part of garden is a Coy Pond, these frolicsome fish are a delight to all.
[Don't forget to take photos of all these things, and show them to your Tour Guide.]

7531.name: Travel Brochure [Kunlun]
7531.desc:
[Kunlun The Hermit Land]
Kunlun is a land in the clouds.
Being so high in the air affords an unprecedented view of the world, it also gives
a different mindset to those whom allow themselves to think freely.
The ^ff0000Statue of Kunlun's Greatest Philosopher^000000, stands proudly in the middle of town, ready to
inspire great thoughts from all those that gaze upon him.	All around Kunlun are spectacular ^ff0000Overlooks of the World^000000.
But there are particular spots that are exceptionally breathtaking, please watch your step.
There is a ^ff0000small hill in Kunlun^000000 that is said to of been the Great Philosophers favorite meditation spot,
you should visit there and see if any grand thoughts take you.
No matter how great a culture is, there will always be a few among its citizenry that just don't 'get it'.
Those in Kunlun's history that always thought small eventually truly shrank, and eventually disappeared.
But before that time they had a ^ff0000Mini-town^000000 that they lived in on ground beneath Kunlun.
That place is an object lesson against stagnant thinking.
[Don't forget to take photos of all these things, and show them to your Tour Guide.]

7532.name: Travel Brochure [Louyang]
7532.desc:
[Louyang]
Louyang is a spiritual country, where the warrior spirit and clear thinking are highly prized.
Such wondrous sites such as the ^ff0000Statue of the Man and the Tiger^000000 may inspire you to do your best.
Louyang has a different perspective on healing the mind and the body.	While Rune-Midgard relies on the science of potions,
and Faith for healing, the Louyang healers practice their art at a '^ff0000Hospital^000000'.
At a Hospital, your body will be cured by a system of body manipulations and diet.
The beautiful ^ff0000Palace^000000 that is protected by the Great Wall of Louyang is truly a sight to behold for every visitor.
To go along with their proud heritage of Martial Arts and spirit training, they often practice making their bodies
more robust through exercise. Some of these exercises target the legs others the Lungs.
Outside Louyang some practice their ^ff0000Shouting on the Tower^000000.	If you have seen all these sites in Louyang,
you will have quite a few good memories to take home.
[Don't forget to take photos of all these things, and show them to your Tour Guide.]

7533.name: Travel Brochure [Ayothaya]
7533.desc:
[Ayothaya]
Thoughts of transcending your limitations, and finding Life's perfect philosophy is Ayothaya's Heritage.
In Ayothaya's history is great Philosopher that all Ayothayans seek to emulate.
There are numerous statues representing this Philosopher exist in and around Ayothaya.
You should visit them to see what differences and significance these ^ff0000Reclining Philosopher Statues^000000 mean to you.
Part of the Philosophy involves many hours of meditation a day to keep balance in your mind and body.
You should visit the ^ff0000Shrine in Ayothaya^000000 and meditate upon your life's journey.
And when you complete your regimen of Exercise and Introspection you can refuel your body by visiting
the ^ff0000Tom Yum Goong restaurant^000000.	The famous soup made here is truly delicious.
Don't leave Ayothaya without sampling the dishes there.
[Don't forget to take photos of all these things, and show them to your Tour Guide.]

8423.name: Angelic Valkyrie Armor
8423.desc:
[ ^008800Refine Awakening^000000 ]
An angelic armor used by the Angelic Valkyries during the Valkyrian War.
[ ^008800Equip Set Awakening^000000 ]
^FF0000Must equip the 4 parts of Angelic Valkyrie costume to take its effect.^000000
Grants additional bonus depending on the combined refine rate of your ^000088Helm^000000, ^000088Armor^000000, ^000088Garment^000000, and ^000088Footgear^000000.
You will get all the set bonuses that your equipment meets. For example, if you have a +7 Helm, +7 Armor, +7 Garment, and +8 Foot gear, you will receive both the bonuses for reaching +6 and +7. Any piece of equipment exceeding the set bonus requirement will not negate any previous set bonus already unlocked.
[^008800+6 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Enable use of ^008800Lvl 1 Sight^000000
[^008800+7 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Enable use of ^008800Lvl 1 Hiding^000000
[^008800+8 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Max HP & SP +8%
[^008800+9 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
All Stats + 5
Increases resistance to all properties by 3%
[^008800+10 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Additional resistance to all properties by 7%
Increases physical & magic damage to all properties by 5%.
[^008800+11 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
STR, INT, DEX, VIT + 11
Additional physical & magic damage to all properties by 5%.
[^008800+12 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
AGI, LUK + 12
Increase Movespeed: 100%.
Reflect 12% Physical and Range damage back to enemy.
[^008800+13 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Weight + 1,300
Decreases Chance of being hit by critical by 13%
Ignores physical and magic defense from Demihuman monster by 13%.
[^008800+14 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Max HP & SP + 7%
Enable to see hidden enemies.
Decreases Chance of being hit by critical by +7%
Ignores physical and magic defense from Demihuman monster by +7%.
------------------------
[ ^008000Deposit Effect^000000 ]
VIT +1, HP +1%
------------------------
Class :^777777 Costume Armor^000000
Defense :^777777 0^000000
Weight :^777777 10^000000
Applicable Job :^777777 All^000000

20724.name: Angelic Wing Blue
20724.desc:
^008800Source: Quest Item^000000
-------------------------
This item can replace ^777777Angelic Valkyrie Manteau^000000 in the ^777777Refine Awakening Set^000000 effect.
-------------------------
Weight + 500
Movespeed + 100%
-------------------------
[ ^008800Refine Awakening^000000 ]
An angelic wing used by the Angelic Valkyries during the Valkyrian War.
[ ^008800Equip Set Awakening^000000 ]
^FF0000Must equip the 4 parts of Angelic Valkyrie costume to take its effect.^000000
Grants additional bonus depending on the combined refine rate of your ^000088Helm^000000, ^000088Armor^000000, ^000088Garment^000000, and ^000088Footgear^000000.
You will get all the set bonuses that your equipment meets. For example, if you have a +7 Helm, +7 Armor, +7 Garment, and +8 Foot gear, you will receive both the bonuses for reaching +6 and +7. Any piece of equipment exceeding the set bonus requirement will not negate any previous set bonus already unlocked.

Enable use of ^008800Lvl 1 Sight^000000
[^008800+7 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Enable use of ^008800Lvl 1 Hiding^000000
[^008800+8 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Max HP & SP +8%
[^008800+9 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
All Stats + 5
Increases resistance to all properties by 3%
[^008800+10 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Additional resistance to all properties by 7%
Increases physical & magic damage to all properties by 5%.
[^008800+11 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
STR, INT, DEX, VIT + 11
Additional physical & magic damage to all properties by 5%.
[^008800+12 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
AGI, LUK + 12
Increase Movespeed: 100%.
Reflect 12% Physical and Range damage back to enemy.
[^008800+13 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Weight + 1,300
Decreases Chance of being hit by critical by 13%
Ignores physical and magic defense from Demihuman monster by 13%.
[^008800+14 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Max HP & SP + 7%
Enable to see hidden enemies.
Decreases Chance of being hit by critical by +7%
Ignores physical and magic defense from Demihuman monster by +7%.

20878.name: Angelic Valkyrie Wings Dark
20878.desc:
^008800Source: Quest Item^000000
-------------------------
This item can replace ^777777Angelic Valkyrie Manteau^000000 in the ^777777Refine Awakening Set^000000 effect.
-------------------------
Weight + 500
Movespeed + 100%
-------------------------
[ ^008800Refine Awakening^000000 ]
An angelic wing used by the Angelic Valkyries during the Valkyrian War.
[ ^008800Equip Set Awakening^000000 ]
^FF0000Must equip the 4 parts of Angelic Valkyrie costume to take its effect.^000000
Grants additional bonus depending on the combined refine rate of your ^000088Helm^000000, ^000088Armor^000000, ^000088Garment^000000, and ^000088Footgear^000000.
You will get all the set bonuses that your equipment meets. For example, if you have a +7 Helm, +7 Armor, +7 Garment, and +8 Foot gear, you will receive both the bonuses for reaching +6 and +7. Any piece of equipment exceeding the set bonus requirement will not negate any previous set bonus already unlocked.
[^008800+6 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Enable use of ^008800Lvl 1 Sight^000000
[^008800+7 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Enable use of ^008800Lvl 1 Hiding^000000
[^008800+8 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Max HP & SP +8%
[^008800+9 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
All Stats + 5
Increases resistance to all properties by 3%
[^008800+10 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Additional resistance to all properties by 7%
Increases physical & magic damage to all properties by 5%.
[^008800+11 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
STR, INT, DEX, VIT + 11
Additional physical & magic damage to all properties by 5%.
[^008800+12 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
AGI, LUK + 12
Increase Movespeed: 100%.
Reflect 12% Physical and Range damage back to enemy.
[^008800+13 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Weight + 1,300
Decreases Chance of being hit by critical by 13%
Ignores physical and magic defense from Demihuman monster by 13%.
[^008800+14 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Max HP & SP + 7%
Enable to see hidden enemies.
Decreases Chance of being hit by critical by +7%
Ignores physical and magic defense from Demihuman monster by +7%.
------------------------
[ ^008000Deposit Effect^000000 ]
HP +2%
------------------------
Class :^777777 Costume^000000
Defense :^777777 0^000000
Equipped on :^777777 Garment^000000
Weight :^777777 10^000000
Applicable Job :^777777 All^000000

You will get all the set bonuses that your equipment meets. For example, if you have a +7 Helm, +7 Armor, +7 Garment, and +8 Foot gear, you will receive both the bonuses for reaching +6 and +7. Any piece of equipment exceeding the set bonus requirement will not negate any previous set bonus already unlocked.

40096.name: Sealed Angelic Armor
40096.desc:
[ ^008800Refine Awakening^000000 ]
An angelic armor used by the Angelic Valkyries during the Valkyrian War.
[ ^008800Equip Set Awakening^000000 ]
^FF0000Must equip the 4 parts of Angelic Valkyrie costume to take its effect.^000000
Grants additional bonus depending on the combined refine rate of your ^000088Helm^000000, ^000088Armor^000000, ^000088Garment^000000, and ^000088Footgear^000000.
You will get all the set bonuses that your equipment meets. For example, if you have a +7 Helm, +7 Armor, +7 Garment, and +8 Foot gear, you will receive both the bonuses for reaching +6 and +7. Any piece of equipment exceeding the set bonus requirement will not negate any previous set bonus already unlocked.
[^008800+6 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Enable use of ^008800Lvl 1 Sight^000000
[^008800+7 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Enable use of ^008800Lvl 1 Hiding^000000
[^008800+8 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Max HP & SP +4%
[^008800+9 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
All Stats + 2
Increases resistance to all properties by 1%
[^008800+10 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Additional resistance to all properties by 3%
Increases physical & magic damage to all properties by 2%.
[^008800+11 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
STR, INT, DEX, VIT + 5
Additional physical & magic damage to all properties by 2%.
[^008800+12 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
AGI, LUK + 6
Increase Movespeed: 50%.
Reflect 6% Physical and Range damage back to enemy.
[^008800+13 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Weight + 650
Decreases Chance of being hit by critical by 6%
Ignores physical and magic defense from Demihuman monster by 6%.
[^008800+14 Set Refine Bonus^000000]
Max HP & SP + 3%
Enable to see hidden enemies.
Decreases Chance of being hit by critical by +3%
Ignores physical and magic defense from Demihuman monster by +3%.
Class :^777777 Costume Armor^000000
Defense :^777777 0^000000
Weight :^777777 10^000000
Applicable Job :^777777 All^000000
